somali.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Qeexitaanka IAU ee 2006 wuxuu doonayaa in meerayaashu ka nadiifiyaan xaafadda wareeggooda burburka kale.
somali.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Waxaa sidoo kale loo yaqaan 'aagga Goldilocks' — aan aad u kululayn, aan aadna u qabow ahayn si biyo dareere ah ay dusha uga jiraan.
somali.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Dayaxu si sax ah hal mar buu isku wareegaa wareeg kasta — isku-waafajintan waxaa keena xoogagga mawjadaha oo bilyaman sano socday.
somali.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Roverka Opportunity wuxuu helay 'blueberries' hematite ah — macdano biyaha oo kaliya ku samaysma. Sawirrada wareegga waxay muujinayaan deltooyin webi oo qadiim ah!
somali.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus way ka kululahay (462°C vs 430°C)! Mercury ma laha jawi uu kulaylka ku qabto. Saameynta aqal-dhirmadu way ka muhiimsan tahay masaafada.
somali.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Meerayaasha gaaska ee waaweyni dusha adag ma laha! Inta badan waa gaas haydarojiin iyo heelyam ah oo si tartiib ah u sii cufnaanaya xagga xudunta. Baaruhu wuxuu u sii degi lahaa si aan dhammaad lahayn.
somali.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Masaafada u dhaxaysa Dhulka iyo Qorraxda maalintii ma beddelanto. Duhurku wuxuu uun ka dhigan yahay in Qorraxdu ay cirkaaga ugu sarrayso. Dhulku wuxuu ugu dhawaadaa Janaayo (perihelion)!
somali.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter wuxuu 11 jeer ka ballaaran yahay Dhulka, 1,300 Dhul ayaana gudihiisa ku qaadi kara! Nidaamka qorraxdu wuxuu leeyahay kala duwanaansho cabbir oo aad u weyn.
somali.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto weli wuxuu ku jiraa nidaamka qorraxda! Waxaa laga beddelay 'meere' loona yeedhay 'meere yar' sannadkii 2006, laakiin weli Qorraxduu ku wareegaa.
somali.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Suunka asteroidyadu inta badan waa meel bannaan! Masaafada celceliska ah ee u dhaxaysa asteroidyadu waa malaayiin km. Markabyada hawadu way dhex maraan iyada oo aan khatar jirin.
somali.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Mar walba maya! Saturn cufkeedu waa 95 jeer kan Dhulka laakiin cuf-jiidadka dushu waa 1.06g oo kaliya sababtoo ah aad bay u weyn tahay cufnaantuna way hooseysaa. Miisaanku wuxuu ku xidhan yahay cufka IYO gacan-dhexaadka labadaba.
somali.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Dhammaan qaybaha Dayaxu waxay helaan iftiinka qorraxda! 'Dhinaca fog' waa kaliya badhka aynaan Dhulka ka arki karin isku-xidhnaanta mawjadaha awgeed. Isla qorrax le'eg ayuu helaa.
somali.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Aagga la degi karo (ama 'aagga Goldilocks') waa xadka masaafooyinka xiddig laga qiyaaso ee biyo dareere ah ay dusha meeraha ka jiri karaan. Nidaamkeenna qorraxda, Venus waxay ku taal cidhifka gudaha, Dhulku wuxuu ku yaal bartamaha, Marsna wuxuu ku yaal cidhifka dibadda. Laakiin biyo dareere ah waxay sidoo kale u baahan yihiin jawi iyo beer birlabeed sax ah!
somali.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Marka iftiinka qorraxdu kululeeyo dusha meeraha, dushu waxay soo celisaa kulayl (infrared). Gaasaska aqal-dhirmada (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) ayaa kulaylkan nuuga oo dib u soo celiya, taasoo meeraha kululaysa. Aqal-dhirmada Dhulku waa +33°C (nolosha ilaalisa). Tan Venus waa +510°C (xakameyn la'). Mars ku dhawaad midna ma laha (celcelis ahaan -60°C). Xaddiga gaaska aqal-dhirmada ayaa go'aamiya natiijada!
somali.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Beerta birlabeed ee meerahu waxay abuurtaa 'birlab-wareeg' — gaashaan aan la arki karin oo iska celiya dabaysha qorraxda (walxaha korontaysan ee Qorraxda ka yimaada). Birlab-wareegga Dhulku wuxuu ilaaliyaa jawigeenna wuxuuna nolosha suurtogal ka dhigaa. Mars waxay beerteedii birlabeed lumisay 4 bilyan oo sano ka hor, jawigeediina si tartiib ah ayaa loo siibay. Birlab-wareegga Jupiter wuxuu 20,000 jeer ka xoog badan yahay kan Dhulka!
somali.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Sannadkii 2006, Ururka Caalamiga ah ee Cilmiga Xiddigiska (IAU) wuxuu qeexay saddex shuruudood oo meere: (1) Qorraxda ku wareega ✓, (2) Cuf ku filan uu qaab wareegsan ku yeesho ✓, (3) 'Wareeggiisa ka nadiifiyay' burburka kale ✗. Pluto wuxuu aagga wareeggiisa la wadaagaa kumanaan shay oo Suunka Kuiper ah, sidaas darteed waxaa loo kala saaray 'meere yar.' Taasi kama dhigayso mid xiiso yar — New Horizons wuxuu muujiyay inuu firfircoon yahay dhanka dhismaha dhulka!
somali.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Bilyaman sano gudahood, xoogagga mawjadaha ee cuf-jiidadku waxay hoos u dhigi karaan wareegga dayax ilaa uu la mid noqdo muddada wareeggiisa. Natiijadu: hal weji ayaa had iyo jeer meeraha u jeeda. Dayaxeennu wuxuu si mawjadeed ugu xidhan yahay Dhulka. Mercury qayb ahaan ayuu Qorraxda ugu xidhan yahay (saamiga 3:2). Pluto iyo Charon si labada dhinacba ah ayay isugu xidhan yihiin — had iyo jeer isla weji ayay is tusaan!
somali.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Calaamad-nololeed (biosignature) waa cadeyn kasta oo nolol hore ama mid hadda jirta. Saynisyahannadu waxay raadiyaan: (1) biyo dareere ah, (2) unugyo organic ah, (3) gaasas jawi sida ogsijiinta ama meetheynka oo aan jiri karin haddii aysan nolol soo saarin, (4) ilo tamareed. Musharraxiinta ugu fiican nidaamkeenna qorraxda: Mars (biyo qadiim ah), Europa (bad hoosaad), Enceladus (ilo-kacsan biyo ah), iyo Titan (harooyin meetheyn ah).

somali.adjust_solar_wind_latitude_and_altitud: Hagaaji dabaysha qorraxda, loolka, iyo sarajoogga si aad iftiinka cirifka u habeyso. Midabku wuxuu ku xidhan yahay walxaha kiciya atamyada jawiga ee kala duwan.
somali.a_comet_gets_two_tails_when_it_nears_t: Xiddig-dabeedku wuxuu yeeshaa laba dabo marka uu Qorraxda u dhowaado. Hagaaji masaafada + xaglaha dabaysha si aad u aragto sida ay u samaysmaan.
somali.curved_pushed_by_photon_radiation_pres: — qalloocan, waxaa riixa cadaadiska shucaaca fotoonka (gaabis)
somali.straight_pushed_by_solar_wind_charged_: — toosan, waxaa riixa walxaha korontaysan ee dabaysha qorraxda (dheereeya)
somali.adjust_mass_and_spin_watch_the_event_h: Hagaaji cufka iyo wareegga. Daawo cirifka dhacdada oo korayo iyo saxanka ururka oo falcelinaya. Wareeg xoog badan wuxuu tuuraa qulqulyo cirifeed.
somali.black_hole_has_3_properties_mass_spin_: Godka madow wuxuu leeyahay saddex sifo: cuf, wareeg, koronto. Cirifka dhacdadu waa barta aan laga soo laaban karin — marka iftiinku ka gudbo, waxba kama baxsan karaan. Saxanka ururku waa walxo gudaha ku soo wareegaya, oo xoqiddu malaayiin darajo u kululaysay. Godadka si degdeg ah u wareega waxay tuuri karaan qulqulyo xawaare-sare ah oo dhidibka wareegga raaca.
somali.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Rog sannadaha Dhulka oo daawo shantii meere ee gudaha oo ku wareegaya xawaarahooda dhabta ah. Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler oo dhaqaaqaya.
somali.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler: muddada wareegga oo la laba-jibbaaray ∝ masaafada oo la saddex-jibbaaray. Meerayaasha guduhu way ordaan; kuwa dibaddu way gurguurtaan. Jupiter wuxuu qaataa 12 sano oo Dhul ah hal wareeg; Mercury wuxuu wareeg dhammaystiraa 88 maalmood kasta.
somali.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Ka dhis markab hawo qaybo dhab ah. Dooro xudunta, korontada, riixidda + xamuulka — daawo cufka + qiimaha oo cusboonaanaya.
somali.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Qorraxdu waxay leedahay wareeg 11 sano ah oo firfircoonaanta barooyinka qorraxda. Rog si aad u aragto barooyinka qorraxda oo iman oo tegaya + duulimaadyada CME.
somali.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Qorraxdu waxay wareegtaa ~11 sano kasta inta u dhaxaysa ugu yaraan (barooyin yar, deggan) iyo ugu badnaan (barooyin badan, ololka qorraxda + CME oo isdaba yimaada). Wareegga 25-aad wuxuu gaadhay heerkiisii ugu sarreeyay ilaa 2024-2025 hadduuna hoos u dhacayaa.
somali.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Xaggee nolosha aan naqaan ay kaga badbaadi kartaa xiddig kasta? Hagaaji iftiinka xiddigga + masaafada meeraha si aad u aragto.
somali.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Aagga la degi karo waa halka biyaha dushu ay dareere ku sii ahaan karaan. Cidhifka gudaha: saameynta aqal-dhirmadu way engejisaa. Cidhifka dibadda: barafku wuxuu qabtaa CO2, barafowga xakameyn la'aanteed. Cidhifyadu waxay u cabbiran yihiin √L.
somali.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Jiid Dayaxa oo soo dhoweey si aad mawjadaha Dhulka u weyneyso. Ogow in buuxintu ay ku jirto labada dhinac ee dhow + fog labadaba.
somali.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Mawjaduhu waxay u dhacaan sababtoo ah cuf-jiidadku si xoog badan ayuu u jiidaa dhinaca dhow marka loo eego dhinaca fog ee Dhulka. Labada dhinacba dibadda ayay u buuxaan. Qorraxda iyo Dayaxa wadajir waxay abuuraan mawjado waaweyn (isku toosan) + kuwo yaryar (is-dhaafsan).
somali.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Wareeji Dhulka oo hagaaji xilliga. Daawo khadka maalin/habeen oo dhaqaaqaya + janjeedhka dhidibka oo beddelaya nusgoobada qorraxdu iftiimiso.
somali.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Shan bar oo cuf-jiidad dheelli tiran oo u dhaxaysa laba jir halkaas oo markabka hawadu ku laalaadi karo. James Webb wuxuu fadhiyaa L2.
somali.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Cagaar: dheelli xasilloon (L4, L5) • Jaalle: aan xasilloonayn laakiin faa'iido leh (L1, L2, L3)
somali.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Shan bar oo ku jira wareeg kasta oo laba jir leh halkaas oo cuf-jiidadka iyo saameynta bartame-ka-fogaanshuhu dheelli tiran yihiin. Markabka hawadu halkan ayuu ku dhigan karaa shidaal aad u yar. JWST wuxuu fadhiyaa L2 — had iyo jeer Dhulka gadaashiisa, Qorraxdana ka fog.
somali.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Curiye kastaa wuxuu iftiinka ku reebaa far-suul dhererro-hir gaar ah. Rog curiyayaasha si aad u aragto sida cirbixiyeennadu ugu aqoonsadaan xiddigaha fog.
somali.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Curiye kastaa wuxuu soo saaraa qaab u gaar ah oo dhererro-hir iftiin ah — far-suulkiisa spektarka. Annagoo eegayna iftiinka xiddigaha fog, waxaan go'aamin karnaa waxa ay ka samaysan yihiin. Sidan ayaan ku ognahay in Qorraxdu 75% tahay haydarojiin!
somali.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Guji kooxaha xiddigaha si aad u aragto xiddigahooda + khadadka isku xidha. Xiddig kastaa wuxuu leeyahay midab u gaar ah + magac dhab ah.
somali.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Kooxaha xiddiguhu waa qaabab xiddigo ah oo dhaqamadu kumanaan sano aqoonsadeen. IAU wuxuu 1922 rasmi ka dhigay 88 koox xiddigeed. Xiddigaha koox ku jira badanaa jir ahaan isuma dhowa — waxay kaliya u muuqdaan kuwo isku dhow marka Dhulka laga eego.
somali.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Immisa delta-v + waqti safar ayaa loo baahan yahay in la gaadho meelo kala duwan? Wareegyada wareejinta Hohmann oo la muujiyay.
somali.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Wareejinta Hohmann waa habka shidaalka ugu badbaadiya ee lagu dhex guuro laba wareeg oo goobo ah. Wuxuu isticmaalaa laba gubasho: mid lagu galo beydka wareejinta, mid lagu goobeeyo meesha aad tagayso. Δv waa wadarta isbeddelka xawaaraha ee loo baahan yahay.
somali.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Kaxee rover bilowga ilaa bartilmaameedka. Ka qorshee dhagaxyada iyo buuraha; ilaali shidaalkaaga!
somali.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Kaxee roverka bilowga ilaa bartilmaameedka. Qiimaha: dhul siman 1,
somali.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Qorshee waddada si aad shidaal u badbaadiso. Sida roverrada dhabta ah ee Mars, mitir kastaa wuxuu u baahan yahay miisaaniyad shidaal.
somali.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Sida cirbixiyeennadu masaafada u cabbiraan: hab kastaa wuxuu kan xiga saldhig u yahay. Ka fuul cabbirka Dhulka ilaa koonka la arki karo.
somali.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Wuxuu isbarbardhigay xaglaha qorraxda ee laba magaalo. Cabbirkii ugu horreeyay ee Dhulka.
somali.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 BCE) wuxuu isticmaalay hooska Dhulka ee Dayaxa inta lagu jiro madoobaadka si uu masaafada u qiyaaso.
somali.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Wuxuu qeexayaa halbeegga cirbixiyeenka. Raadaarka casriga ah ee dib u soo noqdaa wuu saxsan yahay ilaa mitirro.
somali.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler: masaafada oo laga helo muddada wareegga. Hadda waxaa xaqiijiyay markabyada hawada.
somali.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Wareegga Dhulku wuxuu bixiyaa saldhig 2 AU ah. Xiddiggu wuxuu u muuqdaa mid xilliyo beddelaya.
somali.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Muddada garaaca ayaa muujisa iftiinka dhabta ah. Isbarbardhig iftiinka muuqda si aad masaafada u hesho.
somali.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Isla habka Cepheid oo loo fidiyay galaxyada kale. Hubble wuxuu 1923 muujiyay in Andromeda ay galaxyadeenna ka baxsan tahay.
somali.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galaxyada ka sii fogi si dheereysa ayay dib ugu socdaan. v = H × d ayaa masaafada bixiya.
somali.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Asalka Mowjadaha Yaryar ee Koonku waa iftiin 13.8 bilyan oo sano ka hor, oo ballaadhintu fidisay.
somali.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Iftiinka ka yimaada waxyaabaha dib u socda wuxuu u leexdaa casaanka; kan soo dhowaanayana wuxuu u leexdaa buluugga. Sidan ayaan ku cabbirnaa masaafooyinka koonka + ku ognahay in koonku ballaadhayo.
somali.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Immisa iftiin qorrax oo meeraha ku soo dega ayaa la milicsadaa iyo immisa la nuugaa? Tan ayaa wadata heerkulka guud.
somali.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = qaybta iftiinka la milicsaday. Barafka + daruuruhu aad bay wax u milicsadaan (albedo sare); carrada madow + biyuhu way nuugaan (albedo hooseeya). Milicsi badan = meere ka qabow. Tani waa falcelinta baraf-albedo ee wadata xilliyada barafka.
somali.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: 13.8 bilyan oo sano oo hal siiliye lagu cadaadiyay. Ka rog barta keliya ilaa maanta.
somali.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: Meel-waqti + walxo hal bar lagu cadaadiyay
somali.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Koonku wuxuu ku ballaadhaa 10²⁶ ilbiriqsi qaybtiis
somali.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Quark-yadu waxay isu xidhaan borotoon iyo nutroon
somali.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Xudunyadii atam ee ugu horreeyay: haydarojiin, heelyam, lithium
somali.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atamyadii ugu horreeyay; fotoonnada CMB waa la sii daayay
somali.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Xiddigo ma jiraan; inta badan haydarojiin dhexdhexaad ah + walax madow
somali.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Xiddigaha Koox III: waaweyn, cimri gaaban
somali.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Isku-darsanaantu waxay abuurtaa abuurkii galaxyada ugu horreeyay
somali.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: Galaxyada intooda badan waa la isku uruuriyay; samaynta xiddiguhu way sare u kacdaa
somali.our_sun_and_planets_accrete: Qorraxdeenna iyo meerayaasheennu way isku ururaan
somali.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Ballaadhintu way dardar gelaysaa tamarta madow awgeed
somali.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Koonku waa 13.8 bilyan oo sano jir. Wuxuu ku bilaabmay cufnaan iyo kulayl aan xad lahayn, ka dibna wuu ballaadhay oo qaboobay. Galaxyaduhu waxay samaysmeen 1 bilyan oo sano gudahood, Qorraxdeennuna 9 bilyan oo sano, annaguna waxaan halkan joognaa 13.8 bilyan oo sano.
somali.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Guji asteroidyada soo socda ka hor inta aysan Dhulka gaadhin. Sida difaaca meerayaasha ee hawlgalka DART ee NASA.
somali.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Barnaamij NASA oo dhab ah: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) wuxuu si guul leh u beddelay wareegga Dimorphos sannadkii 2022. Xafiiska Isku-duwidda Difaaca Meerayaasha wuxuu la socdaa in ka badan 30,000 shay oo Dhulka u dhow.
somali.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Afar qaab galaxy ah. Kuwa wareegsan sida keenna waxay muujiyaan gacmo raadraacaya samaynta xiddigaha. Kuwa beydsani waa duugoobay, kuwa aan caadiga ahaynna waa qas.
somali.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Dalool weyni wuxuu ururiyaa iftiin badan + wuxuu muujiyaa faahfaahin fiiqan. Weyneyntu way ka muhiim yar tahay intaad moodayso.
somali.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Daloolku wuu ka muhiimsan yahay weyneynta! Muraayad weyni waxay ururisaa iftiin badan + waxay muujisaa faahfaahin fiiqan. Weyneyn ka badan ilaa 20x sentimitirkiiba dalool waxay kaliya wax mugdiyeysaa. Muraayadda 6.5 m ee JWST waxay baadhaa galaxyada boqollaal milyan oo sano ee ugu horreeyay Qaraxii Weynaa kadib.
somali.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Jiid siiliyaha sarajoogga kor ugu dhex mar jawiga Dhulka. Cadaadisku wuu hoos u dhacaa, heerkulku wuu lulmaa, kimistarigana lakab-lakab ayuu u beddelmaa.
somali.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Cimiladu halkan bay ka dhacdaa. Heerkulku wuu hoos u dhacaa marka sarajoogku kordho.
somali.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Lakabka ozone-ku wuxuu nuugaa UV. Heerkulku wuu kordhaa marka sarajoogku kordho.
somali.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteoraduhu halkan bay ku gubtaan. Lakabka ugu qabow (-90°C).
somali.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS halkan buu ku wareegaa (400km). Iftiinka cirifka. Hawo aad u khafiif ah laakiin kulul.
somali.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Xadka hawada sare. Hawadu waxay u baxdaa hawada sare.
somali.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Indha-indheynta Galileo ee 1610: Venus waxay marto marxalado. Tani waxay caddaysay in Venus ay Qorraxda ku wareegto, ee aanay Dhulka ku wareegin.
somali.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Daahfurka Galileo ee 1610: Venus waxay leedahay marxalado sida Dayaxa
somali.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Sannadkii 1610 Galileo wuxuu Venus ku eegay telescope-kiisa wuxuuna arkay inay marto marxalado — sida Dayaxa. Tani waxay caddayn u ahayd in Venus ay Qorraxda ku wareegto, ee aanay Dhulka ku wareegin. Nidaamka Ptolemy ee dhul-dhexaadka ahi ma sharxi karo Venus buuxda. Caddayn weyn oo taageeraysa qorrax-dhexaadka Copernicus.
somali.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Beerta birlabeedku waxay iska celisaa dabaysha qorraxda + waxay ilaalisaa jawiga. Mars labadaba way lumisay; sidaas darteed way madhan tahay.
somali.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Beerta birlabeed ee Dhulku waxay iska celisaa inta badan dabaysha qorraxda, iyadoo ilaalinaysa jawiga + nolosha. Mars waxay beerteedii birlabeed lumisay ~4 bilyan oo sano ka hor waxayna si tartiib ah u lumisay jawigeedii. Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay beerta ugu xoogga badan nidaamka qorraxda.
somali.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: U beddel muuqaalka cabbirka iyo kan masaafada. Labadaba isku mar cabbir sax ah lama tusi karo — sidaas ayay hawadu u madhan tahay.
somali.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Cabbirrada dhabta ah way adag tahay in isku mar la tuso. Haddii Dhulku digir ahaan lahaa, Qorraxdu waxay noqon lahayd kubbad xeebeed oo 200 fuudh u jirta. Haddii masaafooyinku sax noqdaan, meerayaashu waxay noqonayaan dhibco aan la arki karin. Sawirrada intooda badani way isdhaafsadaan.
somali.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Riix si aad u gaabiso soo-degiddaada. Ku deg si ka jilicsan 2.5 m/s haddii kale waad burburaysaa. Maamul shidaalka — kuma filna in aad si bilaash ah u laalaadid.
somali.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 wuxuu ku dhawaaday inuu shidaalka ka dhammaado inta lagu jiro soo-degidda dayaxa. Neil Armstrong ayaa gacanta ku beddelay duuliyaha tooska ah si uu u helo goob degitaan oo ka jilicsan. Degitaanku wuxuu dhacay iyadoo ~25 ilbiriqsi oo shidaal ah ay hadheen.
somali.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Dooro meesha aad tagayso + arag inta ay iftiinku ku qaadanayso inuu gaadho. Nidaamka qorraxda ka baxsan, masaafooyinku way yaab noqdaan.
somali.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Iftiinku wuxuu socdaa 300,000 km/s. Waxyaabaha fog waxaan u aragnaa siday ahaayeen markii iftiinku ka baxay. Qorraxda aan aragno waa 8 daqiiqo jir; Proxima Centauri waa 4 sano jir. Galaxyada Andromeda waa 2.5 milyan oo sano jir.
somali.sun_path_across_latitudes: ☀ Waddada Qorraxda ee Loolalka Kala Duwan
somali.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Halkee ayay Qorraxdu si sax ah uga soo baxdaa + u dhacdaa? Waxay ku xidhan tahay loolkaaga + maalinta. Isku day Maine iyo Goobada Arctic-ga.
somali.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Waddada qorraxdu waxay ku xidhan tahay loolka + xilliga. Dhulbaraha, qorraxdu si toos ah ayay kor uga sarraysaa. Goobada Arctic-ga, qorrax habeenbadh ah xilliga qorrax-taagga xagaaga + habeen cirifeed xilliga qorrax-taagga jiilaalka. Portland ee Maine: qorraxda bartamaha xagaagu way sarraysaa; bartamaha jiilaalkana, qorraxdu si dirqi ah ayay cirifka aragga uga gudubtaa.
somali.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Dayaxyo qaar waxaa laga yaabaa inay nolol martigeliyaan: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede waxay leeyihiin badaha hoosaadka ah. Hawlgallo firfircoon ayaa hadda raadinaya.
somali.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Badda hoosaadku waxay leedahay 2× biyaha badaha Dhulka. Daloollo kulayl-biyeed ayaa suurtogal ah sagxadda badda. Hawlgallada JUICE + Europa Clipper way socdaan.
somali.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini wuxuu helay ilo-kacsan oo buufinaya biyo + walxo organic ah + haydarojiin + silika. Kimistariga qiiqu wuxuu muujiyaa waxyaabaha iyo ilaha tamarta ee nolosha taageeri kara.
somali.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Jawi qaro weyn oo N2 + CH4 ah. Harooyin meetheyn dareere ah oo dusha ku yaal. Bad biyo-amoonyaak ah oo hoos jirta. Nolol waa suurtogal laakiin mid aad u kala duwan.
somali.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Dayaxa ugu weyn. Caddayn xooggan oo Hubble ka helay bad hoosaad. Hawlgalka JUICE ayaa baadhi doona.
somali.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Dusha ugu duugga weyn ee la arki karo nidaamka qorraxda. Bad hoosaad waa suurtogal. Shucaac ka yar dayaxyada kale ee Jupiter.
somali.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Jirka ugu firfircoon foolkaanaha nidaamka qorraxda. 400+ foolkaano firfircoon. Jawi kibrit-laba-oksaydh ah. Lama degi karo.
somali.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Maxaa loo baahan yahay in Mars la deggaanshiyo? Hagaaji gaaska aqal-dhirmada, dhalaalidda barafka, iyo daboolka dhirta — daawo Mars oo isbeddelaya.
somali.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Dhul-samaynta Mars waxay qaadan lahayd kumanaan sano. Waxaa loo baahan yahay: in jawiga la qarreeyo (gaasaska aqal-dhirmada), dusha la kululeeyo (barafka wuu dhalaalayaa), dhir la geliyo (ogsijiin). Daraasadaha NASA waxay tilmaamayaan in kaydka CO2 ee Mars ee hadda uu aad u khafiif yahay in dhul-samayn lagu sameeyo iyada oo aan wax badan la keenin. Weli inta badan waa khayaali sayniseed.
somali.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble wuxuu 10 maalmood ku dhaygagay meel cir ah oo bannaan wuxuuna helay 3000 galaxy oo fog. Si dhow u eeg + jajab kasta oo caro ah waa galaxy.
somali.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Jajab kasta oo caro ah waa galaxy ka kooban malaayiin ilaa boqollaal bilyan oo xiddig
somali.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: Sannadkii 1995, Hubble wuxuu 10 maalmood u jeediyay meel cir ah oo yar oo madow. Natiijadu: 3000 galaxy oo fog oo hal sawir ku jira. JWST wuxuu tan sii qoto dheereeyay, isagoo baadhaya galaxyada boqollaal milyan oo sano ee ugu horreeyay Qaraxii Weynaa kadib.
somali.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Xiddigaha kululi waxay u muuqdaan kuwo buluug ah; kuwa qaboowna waa casaan. Xiddigaha waxaa loo kala saaraa OBAFGKM sida nooca spektarkooda.
somali.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Xiddig-yare cas — xiddigaha ugu qabow + ugu badan (75% xiddigaha oo dhan)
somali.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Xiddig-yare oranji ah — ka deggan Qorraxda, cimri dheer
somali.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Buluug — xiddigaha ugu kulul + ugu naadirsan, cimrigoodu waa malaayiin sano oo kaliya
somali.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Midabka xiddiggu = heerkulka. Xasuusiyaha cirbixiyeenka ee isku-taxanaha spektarka OBAFGKM (ugu kulul ilaa ugu qabow): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Xiddigaha kululi way ka waaweyn yihiin + way ka dhalaalaan + cimri gaaban bay leeyihiin.
somali.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Maxay Dayaxu had iyo jeer isla weji u tusaa? Xoogagga mawjadaha ayaa wareegiisa gaabiyay. Arag sida masaafada + cufku ay u saameeyaan waqtiga isku-xidhnaanta.
somali.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Xoogagga mawjaduhu si tartiib ah ayay u gaabiyaan wareegga dayax ilaa uu la mid noqdo muddada wareeggiisa. Dayaxeennu si mawjadeed ayuu isugu xidhan yahay: isla weji had iyo jeer Dhulka ayuu u jeedaa. Mercury wuxuu la leeyahay Qorraxda dhawaaq-is-waafaqsan 3:2 (si dhab ah uma xidhna).
somali.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Guji god kasta. Saynisyahannada meerayaasha ee dhabta ahi waxay tiriyaan godadka si ay da'da dushaha u ogaadaan — godad badan = duug weyn.
somali.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Guji godadka si aad u tiriso
somali.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Tirinta godadku waa sida saynisyahannadu ku go'aamiyaan da'da dushaha meerayaasha. Godad badan = dus duug weyn. Dhulalka sare ee Dayaxu aad bay u godgodan yihiin (aad u duug weyn); maria-yaduna waa qulqulyo laafo oo ka da' yar.
somali.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Cufku wuxuu qalloociyaa meel-waqtiga. Jiid cufka + daawo ceelka oo sii qoto dheeraanaya. Rog kubbadda si aad u aragto sida ay u dhacdo.
somali.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Aragtida guud ee isu-xidhnaanta ee Einstein waxay leedahay cufku wuxuu qalloociyaa meel-waqtiga. Waxyaabuhu xoog ma dareemaan — waxay raacaan waddooyinka ugu gaaban ee joomatarigii qalloocnaa. Kanu waa cuf-jiidadka. Godadka madowgu waxay meel-waqtiga u qalloociyaan si aad u dheer oo xitaa iftiinku kama baxsan karo.
somali.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Saddex nooc oo asteroid ah oo waaweyn: C, S, M. Shirkadaha macdantu waxay indhaha ku hayaan nooca M ee birta + balaatiinka.
somali.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Kan ugu badan (75%). Madow, hore, biyo badan. Waxaa laga helaa suunka dibadda.
somali.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Dhagax ah (17%). Ka fudud, waxaa laga sameeyay macdanta silikaytka + bir. Waxaa laga helaa suunka gudaha.
somali.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Bir badan (8%). Inta badan bir + nikkel. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay ka timid xudunta meerayaal bilow ah oo burburay. Bartilmaameedka macdan-qodista.
somali.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Iftiin ka yimid 380,000 sano Qaraxii Weynaa kadib. Kala duwanaanshaha yaryari waa abuurka galaxy kasta.
somali.cosmic_microwave_background_simulated: Asalka Mowjadaha Yaryar ee Koonka (la jileeyay)
somali.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Lulinta heerkulka oo qiyaastii 0.001% ah — abuurka dhismaha oo dhan
somali.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB waa iftiin hadhay oo ka yimid 380,000 sano Qaraxii Weynaa kadib. Kala duwanaanshaha heerkulka ee yaryari waxay muujiyaan halka walaxdu waxoogaa ka cufnayd. Meelahaas cufan waxay u koreen dhammaan galaxyada + xiddigaha aan maanta aragno. Waxaa si lama filaan ah u helay Penzias + Wilson 1965 (Abaalmarinta Nobel 1978).
somali.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Giraamaha Saturn 99% waa baraf biyo ah oo tirilyan jajab ah. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay tahay 100 milyan oo sano oo kaliya.
somali.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Giraamaha Saturn inta badan waa walxo baraf biyo ah oo u dhexeeya xabbado boodh ah ilaa jajab guri le'eg. Waxay ku fidsan yihiin 282,000 km laakiin qaradoodu waa < 1 km. Waxay u badan tahay inay ka samaysmeen dayax burburay ~100 milyan oo sano ka hor — waa cusub yihiin!
somali.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Dooro xudun, dus, jawi, iyo nolol. Arag noocee adduun ah aad samaysay.
somali.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar-yadu waa xiddigo nutroon oo wareegaya oo leh fallaadho birlabeed. Dhulku wuxuu arkaa garaac kaliya marka fallaadhu marto.
somali.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar waa xiddig nutroon oo si degdeg ah u wareega. Cirifyadeeda birlabeedku waxay soo saaraan fallaadho shucaac ah. Waxaan aragnaa garaac kaliya marka fallaadhu na marto — sida nal-badeed. Qaar waxay garaacaan 700 jeer ilbiriqsikiiba. Jocelyn Bell Burnell ayaa 1967 heshay kii ugu horreeyay.
somali.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Durdur walxo korontaysan oo Qorraxda ka yimid, oo Dhulka ku dhaca. Dabayl xoog badan = iftiin cirifeed badan + carqaladeyn GPS.
somali.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Dabaysha qorraxdu waa durdur walxo korontaysan (inta badan borotoon + elektaroon) oo si joogto ah uga qulqulaya Qorraxda. Xawaaruhu wuxuu u dhexeeyaa 250-800 km/s. Duufaannada xooggani waxay keenaan iftiin cirifeed + waxay carqaladeyn karaan GPS + shabakadaha korontada. Dhacdadii Carrington ee 1859: telegraafyadu way dhinbiil bexeen wayna gubteen.
somali.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS wuxuu Dhulka ku wareegaa 90 daqiiqo kasta. Mararka qaar iftiinka maalinta, mararka kalena hooska Dhulka.
somali.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS wuxuu ku wareegaa 400 km kor isagoo socda 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Wuxuu hal wareeg dhammaystiraa 90 daqiiqo kasta — sidaas darteed cirbixiyeennadu waxay maalintii arkaan 16 qorrax-soobax + qorrax-dhac. ISS waa shayga ugu weyn ee dadku hawada sare ka dhiseen.
somali.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 waxaa la duuliyay 1977. Hadda waxay ku jiraan hawada xiddig-dhexaadka; Voyager 1 wuxuu heliopause-ka ka gudbay 2012, Voyager 2-na 2018.
somali.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 waxaa la duuliyay 1977 si ay u baadhaan meerayaasha dibadda. Labaduba waxay ka gudbeen heliopause-ka (xadka dabaysha qorraxda) 2012 + 2018 — hadda waxay ku jiraan hawada xiddig-dhexaadka. Mid kastaa wuxuu sitaa Duubka Dahabka ah oo leh salaan + muusik loogu talagalay shisheeye kasta oo hela.
somali.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury wuxuu Qorraxda hortiisa maraa dhowr sano kasta. Daawo marka uu gudbayo — laakiin kaliya adigoo isticmaalaya shaandho qorrax oo habboon.
somali.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Daawo kaliya adigoo isticmaalaya shaandho qorrax oo HABBOON — WELIGAA si toos ah ha u eegin!
somali.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Marintu waxay dhacdaa marka Mercury (ama Venus) uu dhex maro Dhulka + Qorraxda. Waxay u eg tahay dhibic yar oo madow oo Qorraxda saaran. Marista Mercury ee xigta: Noofembar 13, 2032. Marista Venus ee xigta: Diseembar 2117 — mar dambe ma dhacayso ilaa 2125.
somali.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault 1851 wuxuu ku caddeeyay in Dhulku wareego isagoo isticmaalaya rooggo weyn. Diyaaradda luliddiisu si dheereysa ayay cirifyada ugu wareegtaa.
somali.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault 1851 wuxuu wareegga Dhulka ku muujiyay rooggo weyn. Diyaaradda luliddiisu waxay u muuqataa mid wareegaysa sababtoo ah Dhulku hoostiisa ayuu ka rogmadaa. Cirifyada: 24 saacadood. Dhulbaraha: weligeed ma dhacdo. Maine: ~34 saacadood.
somali.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Cirifka woqooyi ee Saturn wuxuu leeyahay duufaan lix-geesle ah oo dhammaystiran oo 30,000 km ballac ah. Waxaa helay Voyager 1981.
somali.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Duufaanka Lix-geesleha ah ee Cirifka Saturn
somali.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Astaan joogto ah oo 30,000 km ballac ah — in ka badan 2 jeer dhexroorka Dhulka
somali.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn waxay leedahay duufaan lix-geesle ah oo dhammaystiran oo ku yaal cirifkeeda woqooyi — waxaa markii ugu horreysay sawiray Voyager (1981), Cassini-na wuu xaqiijiyay. Lix-geesluhu waa 30,000 km ballac ah wuuna joogto yahay. Muxuu lix-geesle u yahay? Qaabka durdurka jet-ka ee jawiga + mawjadaha Rossby.
somali.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Saacaddii asalka ahayd. Marka Qorraxdu cirka mardo, tiirku wuxuu tuuraa hooska wareega ee saacadaha calaamadiya.
somali.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Saacadaha qorraxdu waxay ka horreeyaan saacadaha kumanaan sano. Marka Qorraxdu cirka marto, hooska tiirku wuu wareegaa. Masaaridiintii hore, Giriigga, Roomaanka, iyo Shiineeska dhammaantood waxay dhiseen saacado qorrax oo sax ah. Kuwa casriga ahi waa inay saxaan waqtiga kaydka maalinta + isleegga waqtiga.
somali.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: 80 galaxy ayaa ku fidsan 10 milyan oo sano-iftiineed oo nagu wareegsan. Jidka Caanaha + Andromeda waxaa laga yaabaa inay isku dhacaan qiyaastii 4-5 bilyan oo sano gudahood — daraasadaha 2025 waxay saadaasha u dhigaan ku dhawaad 50/50.
somali.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: 2.5 Mly ayay u jirtaa — waxay noo soo socotaa!
somali.25k_ly_closest_to_mw: 25k ly — kan ugu dhow Jidka Caanaha
somali.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Kooxda Deegaanka — ~80 galaxy oo ku jira 10 milyan oo sano-iftiineed
somali.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Kooxdeenna Deegaanku waxay leedahay ~80 galaxy oo ay hoggaaminayaan Jidka Caanaha + Andromeda. Andromeda waxay noo soo socotaa 110 km/s — isku dhac waa suurtogal qiyaastii 4-5 bilyan oo sano gudahood. Haddii ay dhacdo: galaxy weyn oo la yidhaahdo Milkomeda.
somali.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroid cabbirkee ah ayaa dila heerkee nolol ah? Isbarbardhig laga bilaabo dhagax yar ilaa kii dinasoorka dilay.
somali.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Galitaanka jawigu wuxuu burburiyaa inta badan dhagaxyada < 5m. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) wuxuu jebiyay daaqadaha laakiin god ma samayn. Tunguska 1908 (50m) wuxuu simay 2000km² kayn ah. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) ayaa dilay dinasoorradii.
somali.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME wuxuu Qorraxda ka tuuraa bilyaman tan oo plasma ah. Maalmo kadib, wuxuu keeni karaa iftiin cirifeed cajiib ah + guuldarro GPS.
somali.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Tuurista Cufka Koronal-ku waxay hawada ku tuurtaa bilyaman tan oo plasma ah oo socda 1-2 milyan mph. Waxay qaadataa 1-5 maalmood inay Dhulka gaadho. CME xoog badan waxay keenaan duufaanno dhul-birlabeed, iftiin cirifeed dhalaalaya, waxayna carqaladeyn karaan dayax-gacmeedyada + shabakadaha korontada.
somali.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid-yadu waxay garaacaan wareeg joogto ah. Muddadoodu waxay muujisaa iftiinkooda dhabta ah — mastarad koonka ah.
somali.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Xiddigaha beddelanaya ee Cepheid waxay garaacaan wareeg joogto ah. Muddadoodu si toos ah ayay ula xidhiidhaa iftiinkooda asalka ah (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Cirbixiyeennadu way cabbiraan muddada + waxay ku go'aamiyaan iftiinka dhabta ah + masaafada.
somali.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Wareegyadu waxay u dhexeeyaan goobooyin ilaa beydad dhaadheer. Hagaaji eksentrisitiga si aad u sawirto waddooyin meere u eg ama xiddig-dabeed u eg.
somali.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eksentrisitiga wareeggu wuxuu u dhexeeyaa 0 (goobo dhammaystiran) ilaa 1 (baxsad parabolig ah). Meerayaashu ku dhawaad waa goobo. Xiddig-dabeedyadu aad bay u beydsan yihiin — waxay Qorraxda u soo dhowaadaan + waxay u sii fogaadaan nidaamka dibadda. Wareegyada hayperbolig ah (e>1) waxay ka dhigan yihiin hal mar oo nidaamka qorraxda la dhex maro.
somali.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Jawiga Dhulku wuxuu xannibaa dhererro-hir badan. Iftiinka la arki karo, raadiyaha, iyo daaqado infrared ah oo qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha.
somali.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Iftiinka la arki karo, mawjadaha raadiyaha, iyo infrared qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha
somali.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Jawiga Dhulku wuxuu xannibaa dhererro-hir badan. Iftiinka la arki karo, raadiyaha, iyo daaqado infrared ah oo qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, iyo cilmiga infrared badankiisa waxay u baahan yihiin goobo indha-indheyn oo hawada ku sugan sida Hubble, JWST, Chandra, iyo Fermi.
somali.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spektarradu waxay muujiyaan heerkulka, ka-koobnaanta, dhaqdhaqaaqa, iyo tilmaamo ku saabsan heerka kobaca ee shayga.
somali.excited_gas_10000_k: Gaas kacsan: caadi ahaan qiyaastii 10,000 K
somali.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Walxaha la tuuray oo ballaadhaya: kumanaan km/s
somali.key_visible_features: Astaamaha muhiimka ah ee la arki karo:
somali.spectral_line_strength_caution: Xoogga khadku maaha cabbir fudud oo tiro: heerkulka, cufnaanta, iyo ayoonayntu waxay sidoo kale go'aamiyaan astaamaha ugu xoogga badan u muuqda. Qalloocyadan waa moodallo waxbarasho oo la fududeeyay.
somali.spectra_life_paths_note: Tusaalayaashani ma aha hal jadwal waqti: xiddig qorraxda u eg wuxuu noqon karaa weyne cas iyo nebula meereed, halka supernova nooca II uu dhammeeyo nolosha xiddig aad u weyn.
somali.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Dhulku wuxuu wareegaa 15° saacaddiiba. Daawo marka ay duhur tahay Tokyo, marka ay qorrax-soobaxdu Portland gaadho.
somali.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Dhulku wuxuu wareegaa 15° saacaddiiba. UTC (Waqtiga Caalamiga ah ee la Isku-duway) waa tixraaca guud. Aagagga waqtigu waxay ku kala duwan yihiin ±saacado. Portland ee Maine waa UTC-5 (EST) ama UTC-4 (EDT). Guud ahaan, kalabar Dhulka waa iftiin halka kalabarka kalena uu habeen yahay.
somali.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Guji 12 xaqiiqo cirbixiyeen ah oo ka soo horjeeda dareenka caadiga ah.
somali.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Sawirrada buugaagtu waa been. Dayaxu wuu ka fog yahay sida loo sawiray. Arag cabbirka dhabta ah.
somali.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Buugaagta badankoodu waxay Dayaxa u sawiraan mid aad u weyn + aad u dhow. Runtu: dhexroorka Dayaxu waa 1/4 kan Dhulka, masaafada Dayaxuna waa ~30 dhexroor Dhul ah. Iftiinku wuxuu safarka ku qaataa 1.3 ilbiriqsi.
somali.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay maalinta ugu gaaban (10 saac). Venus waxay leedahay tan ugu dheer (243 maalmood oo Dhul ah!).
somali.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Dhererka maalinta Nidaamka Qorraxda oo dhan (cabbir log ah)
somali.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter si dheereysa ayuu isugu wareegaa. Venus way ka gaabis badan tahay sannadkeeda.
somali.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Meerayaasha gaaska ee waaweyni si dheereysa ayay isugu wareegaan sida ay u samaysmeen awgeed. Venus ayaa ugu gaabis badan, laga yaabee mawjadaha qorraxda + jiidashada jawiga qaro weyn awgeed. Dhulku wuxuu gaabiyaa ~1.7 milli-ilbiriqsi qarnigiiba cuf-jiidadka Dayaxa awgiis.
somali.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Madoobaadka buuxi wuxuu daboolaa xarig cidhiidhi ah. Waddada madoobaadka 2024 waxay martay Maine woqooyi.
somali.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Waddada Madoobaadka Qorraxda ee Buuxa, Abriil 8, 2024
somali.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Madoobaadka qorraxda ee buuxi wuxuu kaliya ka dhacaa waddooyin cidhiidhi ah oo ~100-150 km ballac ah. Madoobaadkii Abriil 8, 2024 wuxuu maray Maine woqooyi — dad badan oo Maine ah ayaa woqooyi u safray si ay u arkaan buuxnaanta. Madoobaadka buuxa ee xiga ee Maine laga arki karo: May 1, 2079.
somali.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalandarka Koonka ee Sagan: 13.8 bilyan oo sano oo hal sano ku jira. Dadku waxay yimaadaan ilbiriqsigii ugu dambeeyay.
somali.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalandarka Koonka ee Carl Sagan: wuxuu 13.8 bilyan oo sano ku cadaadiyaa 1 sano. Qaraxii Weynaa = Jan 1. Hadda = Dis 31 habeenbadhkii. Dadku waxay soo muuqdeen ilbiriqsiyadii ugu dambeeyay. Ilbaxnimooyinku waxay ku jiraan qaybta ugu dambeysa ee ilbiriqsiga.
somali.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Immisa ilbaxnimo shisheeye ah? Hagaaji qodob kasta oo aan la aqoon + arag jawaabta.
somali.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: gudaha Galaxyadeenna Jidka Caanaha waqti kasta
somali.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Tirada la degi karo nidaamkiiba
somali.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: qiyaasidda ilbaxnimooyinka kale. Qodobbada intooda badan lama yaqaan — jawaabuhu waxay u dhexeeyaan <1 (keligeen) ilaa malaayiin. Wuxuu muujiyaa waxa aynaan aqoon in ka badan intuu jawaab bixiyo. Hagaaji siiliyayaasha si aad u aragto sida natiijadu u dareen badan tahay.
somali.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Laba iyo tobanka telescope ee ugu waaweyn + ugu fiican: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, iyo waxay indha-indheeyaan.
somali.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telescope hawo oo aragti/UV/IR ah. Adeeg 30+ sano ah.
somali.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telescope hawo oo infrared ah. Barta L2 ee Lagrange.
somali.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Laba telescope oo isku eg oo 10m ah oo ku yaal Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
somali.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO Jili, afar telescope oo 8.2m ah.
somali.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Laba isku eg oo 8m ah: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.

somali.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Saf raadiye oo 66 anteen ah, lamadegaanka Jili.
somali.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telescope hawo oo aragti/UV/IR ah. Weli wuu shaqeeyaa.
somali.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telescope hawo oo X-ray ah oo NASA leedahay.
somali.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telescope hawo oo infrared ah, waxaa la hakiyay 2020.
somali.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Mid Jabbaan ah oo 8.2m ah oo ku yaal Mauna Kea.
somali.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telescope raadiye oo mustaqbalka ah, Australia + Koonfur Afrika.
somali.extremely_large_telescope: Telescope-ka Aad u Weyn ee Xad-dhaafka ah
somali.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telescope ESO ah oo 39m ah oo soo socda. Jili.
somali.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Laba iyo toban ka mid ah telescope-yada ugu awoodda badan adduunka. Daloolka (cm) waa dhexroorka muraayadda koowaad. Dalool weyn = iftiin badan + faahfaahin fiiqan. Telescope-yada hawadu waxay ka fogaadaan qalloocinta jawiga.
somali.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Xiddigaha waaweyni si dheereysa ayay u noolaadaan + iyagoo yar bay dhintaan. Hagaaji cufka + arag inta uu xiddiggu gubanayo.
somali.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Xiddigaha waaweyni si dheereysa ayay shidaalka u gubaan. Cimriga ∝ M^-2.5. Qorraxda: 10 Gyr (bartamaha ayaan joognaa). 10 M☉: 30 Myr oo kaliya. Xiddig-yare cas oo 0.1 M☉ ah: tirilyan sano.
somali.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: La soco horumarkaaga: meerayaasha aad sahantay, dhibcaha aad heshay, hawlgallada aad diiwaan gelisay.

somali.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: 16 tallaabo waaweyn oo laga bilaabo cirbixiyeenimadii Giriigga hore ilaa JWST. Magacyo ay tahay inaad ogaato.
somali.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Safar 2300 sano ah oo laga bilaabo Aristarchus ilaa JWST. Daahfur kastaa wuxuu ku dhisnaa kii ka horreeyay. Sayniska waa tartan dabaqad — cirbixiyeen kastaa wuxuu ku taagan yahay garbaha kuwii ka horreeyay.
somali.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Isbarbardhig fasallada heerkulka dusha iyo far-suulasha spektarka ee qeexa.
somali.spectral_class_size_caution: Cabbirrada goobooyinku si ula kac ah ayay isu leeg yihiin. Fasalka spektarku wuxuu sharxayaa heerkulka iyo qaababka khadadka, ee ma aha gacan-dhexaadka ama iftiinka kaligiis; fasalka iftiinka V wuxuu ka dhigan yahay isku-taxanaha weyn, III wuxuu ka dhigan yahay weyne, I-na weyne-sare.
somali.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Isla xarafku wuxuu ku dari karaa xiddigo aad u kala duwan: Proxima Centauri waa xiddig-yare M ah, halka Betelgeuse uu yahay weyne-sare M ah. Qorraxdu waa G2 V.
somali.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars waxay leedahay hawo 100× ka khafiifsan oo inta badan CO₂ ah. Isbarbardhig ka-koobnaanta gaaska + cadaadiska.
somali.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Jawiga Mars waa 100× ka khafiifsan kan Dhulka. Ka-koobnaanta: 95% CO₂. Si aad Mars ugu neefsato waxaad u baahan lahayd ogsijiin + cadaadis 100× ka badan. Nitrojiin bacrimin ah ku dhawaad ma jirto.
somali.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: 10 eray oo lagama maarmaan ah oo godka madow: cirifka dhacdada, barta keliya, siigaysanaanta, shucaaca Hawking.
somali.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Telescope-ka Cirifka Dhacdada wuxuu qaaday sawirkii ugu horreeyay ee godka madow ee M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Giraanta oranji ah = iftiin ku qalloocay goobo madow oo iftiinku aanu ka baxsan karin.
somali.auroras_across_solar_system: 🌈 Iftiinka Cirifka Nidaamka Qorraxda Oo Dhan
somali.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Shan meere ayaa leh iftiin cirifeed. Kan Dhulku waa cagaar/cas, kan Jupiter waa kan ugu xoogga badan, kan Mars-na waa firdhsan.
somali.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Cagaar (ogsijiin) + cas (O atam ah) + buluug (nitrojiin). Sida ugu fiican waxaa lagu arkaa cirifyada birlabeedka agtooda.
somali.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Kan ugu xoogga badan nidaamka qorraxda. Waxaa wada foolkaanaha Io + beerta birlabeed ee Jupiter. Iftiin cirifeed UV ah oo joogto ah.
somali.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Waxaa shidaal u ah dabaysha qorraxda. Midab ka yar kan Dhulka laakiin aad buu u weyn yahay. Wuxuu socdaa maalmo isku xigta.
somali.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Jiho yaab leh janjeedhka dhidibeed ee 98° awgiis. Way adag tahay in la sawiro.

somali.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Afar hab oo cirbixiyeennadu ku sharxaan booska cirka.
somali.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Isku-xidhyo xiddigaha ku dhegan. Kor-u-kaca midig (h:m:s) + Janjeedhka (°). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa buugaagta cirbixiyeenka.
somali.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Daawadaha ayaa udub dhexaad ah. Sarajoogga (cirifka aragga ka sarreeya) + Azimuth (woqooyi laga bilaabo). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa u jeedinta telescope-yada.
somali.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Waxaa udub dhexaad u ah diyaaradda Qorrax-Dhul. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa waxyaabaha nidaamka qorraxda.
somali.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Waxaa udub dhexaad u ah diyaaradda Jidka Caanaha. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa daraasadaha galaxyada.
somali.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Cirbixiyeennadu waxay isticmaalaan nidaamyo isku-xidhyo badan. Dhulbaraheedku waa mid guud + waxyaabuhu waxay hayaan isla isku-xidhyada inta Dhulku wareegayo. Alt-Az had iyo jeer wuu beddelmaa inta Dhulku wareegayo. Galaktigga ayaa ugu fiican daraasadda dhismaha Jidka Caanaha.
somali.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Laga bilaabo 1 Qorrax ilaa 10^22 xiddig. Cabbirka koonku waa mid yaab leh.
somali.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Cirbixiyeenimadu waxay ku shaqaysaa cabbirro aan macquul ahayn. 'Immisa xiddig?' — ka badan xabbadaha ciidda xeeb kasta oo Dhulka ah. 'Immisa jir?' — 13.8 bilyan oo sano. Haddana tirooyin qaar (uumi-bixidda godka madow) ayaa xitaa ka sii weyn.
somali.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: 36,500 shay ayaa Dhulka ku wareega sarajoogyo kala duwan. Dhaqaaji siiliyaha sarajoogga si aad u aragto waxa halkaas jooga.
somali.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: 36,500 shay oo la raad-raaco + malaayiin jajab ayaa Dhulka ku wareega. Khatarta Kessler Syndrome: isku dhacyo isdaba socda ayaa hawada ka dhigaya mid aan la isticmaali karin. SpaceX Starlink waxay leedahay 5000+ dayax-gacmeed; waxay qorsheynayaan kuwo badan oo kale.
somali.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Dhaqan kastaa wuxuu xiddigaha ka arkaa sheekooyin. Laga bilaabo halyeeyada Giriigga ilaa Emu-ga Cirka ee dadka asaliga ah ee Australia.
somali.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Sheekooyin ay dhaqamada adduunka oo dhan xiddigaha saareen. Emu-ga Cirka ee dadka asaliga ah ee Australia wuxuu isticmaalaa daruuraha boodhka ee madow. Hagayaasha Boliineeshiya waxay xiddigaha ku maraan Baasifigga iyagoo xusuusta ku tiirsan. Cirbixiyeenimaduna waa sheeko-sheeg sidoo kale.
somali.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: 5 hab oo cirbixiyeennadu ku helaan meerayaasha ku wareegsan xiddigaha kale. Marista + Doppler ayaa hoggaamiya.
somali.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Daawo xiddig oo raadi hoos-u-dhac yar oo iftiin ah marka meere hortiisa maro. Waxaa isticmaala Kepler + TESS.
somali.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Cuf-jiidadka meerahu wuxuu xiddiggiisa ka dhigaa mid ruxma. Ruxmashada waxaan u aragnaa beddel Doppler oo ku jira iftiinka xiddigga.
somali.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Cuf-jiidadka xiddig+meere sii maraya ayaa qalloociya iftiinka xiddig ka sii fog. Masaafada kuma xidhna.
somali.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Xannib iftiinka xiddigga + sawir meerayaasha u dhow. Ilaa hadda waxay kaliya u shaqaysaa meerayaasha waaweyn/fog.
somali.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Kala duwanaanshaha garaaca pulsar-ku wuxuu muujiyaa jirar ku wareegaya. Meerayaashii dibadda ee ugu horreeyay sidan ayaa loo helay (1992).
somali.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Meerihii dibadda ee ugu horreeyay ee ku wareega xiddig qorraxda u eg: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Hadda 6,300+ ayaa la xaqiijiyay. JWST wuxuu meerayaasha dibadda ku samaynayaa spektroskobi jawi — isagoo raadinaya calaamado nololeed.
somali.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Jadwalka madoobaadyada 2024-2079. Madoobaadka qorraxda ee buuxa ee Maine ku xiga: 2079.
somali.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Madoobaadka qorraxda ee buuxi waa naadir. Qiyaastii mid 18 bilood kasta meel Dhulka ah, laakiin mid kasta waxaa laga arkaa waddo cidhiidhi ah oo kaliya. Madoobaadka dayaxa waxaa laga arkaa dhinaca habeenka oo dhan.
somali.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Kala-saarista Hubble: kuwa wareegsan, kuwa beydsan, kuwa aan caadiga ahayn + wax kasta oo u dhexeeya.
somali.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Gacmo isku dheggan, buur bartame ah oo weyn
somali.forming_stars_rapidly: Si degdeg ah ayuu xiddigo u samaynayaa
somali.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble ayaa 1936 galaxyada kala saaray — 'fargeetada duubka Hubble.' Kuwa wareegsan + kuwa beydsan + kuwa aan caadiga ahayn. Galaxyaduhu waxay ku kobcaan isku-darsanaan — Jidka Caanuhu wuxuu ku jiraa bartamaha noloshiisa; isku-darsanaan Andromeda waxaa laga yaabaa inay imaanayso bilyaman sano gudahood (daraasadaha 2025 waxay saadaasha u dhigaan ku dhawaad 50/50).
somali.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Laga bilaabo socodka ilaa xawaaraha iftiinka (cabbir log ah). Voyager 1 waa shayga dadku sameeyeen ee ugu fog waana mid ka mid ah baarayaasheenna ugu dheereeya, laakiin koonka marka la eego weli waa gaabis.
somali.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 wuu dheereeyaa marka lagu cabbiro markabyada hawada, hadduuna yahay shayga dadku sameeyeen ee ugu fog, haddana wuxuu weli qaadan lahaa qiyaastii 80,000 sano inuu xiddigga ugu dhow gaadho. Iftiinku isla safarkaas wuxuu ku qaataa 4 sano.
somali.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Daawo xiddigaha oo ka samaysmaya boodh qabow ilaa qorraxo kulul. 6 marxaladood oo dhowr milyan oo sano socda.
somali.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Xiddiguhu waxay ku dhashaan kooxo ka soo jeeda daruuro molekul ah oo waaweyn. Habka guud: dhowr milyan oo sano. Tusaalayaal caan ah: Nebula-ga Orion (M42), Nebula-ga Gorgorka (Tiirarka Abuurka), Nebula-ga Tarantula.
somali.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: 10 ka mid ah su'aalaha furan ee ugu qoto dheer cilmiga koonka. Qaar jawaabo qayb ah ayay leeyihiin; qaarna waa qarsoodi saafi ah.
somali.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Shax degdeg ah oo sifooyinka meerayaasha. Dhexroorka, cuf-jiidadka, dhererka maalinta, dayaxyada.
somali.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Isbarbardhig dhinac-dhinac ah oo sifooyinka muhiimka ah ee meerayaasha. Dhulka = saldhigga. Qorraxdu waa qiyaastii 109 jeer dhexroorka Dhulka (in ka badan milyan jeer mugga). Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay 115 dayax oo la yaqaan. Venus si gaabis ah ayay u wareegtaa oo maalinteedu way ka dheer tahay sannadkeeda.
somali.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: 40+ qalab yaryar oo muuqaal + is-dhexgal ah. Waxaa loo sameeyay ardayda + dadka waaweyn ee xiiseeya.
somali.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: 40+ qalab yaryar oo is-dhexgal ah, muujin SVG ah, iyo jilitaan waxbarasho.
somali.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Laga bilaabo wareegga marxaladaha dayaxa ilaa muujiyaha godka madow ilaa rooggaha Foucault, qalab kastaa waxaa loo dhisay in fikradaha aan la taaban karin la dareemo + lagu ciyaaro.
somali.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Waxaa loo dhisay K-12 + dadka waaweyn ee xiiseeya. Fur dhammaan qalabka, ama mid kaliya — mid kastaa keligiis wuu shaqeeyaa.
somali.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Qayb ka mid ah AlloFlow STEM Lab. Waxaa lagu dhisay Maine, USA. Dhammaan xogta waxaa laga soo qaatay NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + ilo sayniseed oo dadweyne. Isticmaalka waxbarashadu waa bilaash.
somali.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: 9 roob meteoro ah oo sannadle ah + taariikhaha ugu fiican ee la arki karo. Calaamadee kalandarkaaga.
somali.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Roobka meteoraduhu wuxuu dhacaa marka Dhulku maro durdurka burburka xiddig-dabeed. Aragga ugu fiican: goob mugdi ah, dayax la'aan, habeenbadhka kadib. Perseids + Geminids ayaa ah roobabka sannadlaha ah ee ugu kalsooni badan.
somali.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: 10 odhaah oo ka yimid cirbixiyeenno + safarrayaal hawo oo yaabka qabta.
somali.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: 10 wax oo aad caawa ku arki karto indhahaaga kaliya ama binokular.
somali.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Indha-indheynta isha qaawan ee ugu fiican: goob mugdi ah (iftiinka magaalada ka fog), Dayaxa oo cirifka aragga ka hooseeya, indhaha oo la qabsaday (20-30 daq mugdiga). Abbaaro bilaash ah: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk waxay kaa caawiyaan aqoonsiga waxaad aragto.
somali.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Milicsiga Carl Sagan ee ugu badan ee la soo xigto. Hal pixel oo ka kooban qof kasta oo aan weligeen naqaan.
somali.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Meeshan fog laga eego, Dhulku waxba xiiso gaar ah uma laha. Laakiin annaga, way ka duwan tahay. Mar kale ka fiirso dhibicdaas. Taasi waa halkan. Taasi waa guriga. Taasi waa innaga. Dusheeda ayaa qof kasta oo aad jeceshahay, qof kasta oo aad taqaan, qof kasta oo aad maqashay, aadmi kasta oo weligiis jiray, ku noolaayeen noloshooda."
somali.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 wuxuu sawirkan Dhulka ka qaaday 6 bilyan km u jira Feb 14, 1990 — codsi ka yimid Carl Sagan. Dhulku waa hal pixel. Aadmi kasta oo taariikhda ka mid ahi wuxuu ku noolaa pixel-kaas.
somali.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: 8 shay oo cir-qoto-dheer ah oo caan ah. Xannaanooyin xiddigeed, qolofo xiddigo dhimanaya, hadhaaga supernova.
somali.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Xannaano xiddigeed oo 24 ly ballac ah. Isha qaawan ayaa laga arkaa Seefta Orion.
somali.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Hadhaaga supernova la arkay 1054 CE. Wuxuu ka kooban yahay pulsar.
somali.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Nebula meereed oo ku yaal Lyra. Qolof dhalaalaysa oo ka timid xiddig qorraxda u eg oo dhimanaya.
somali.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Guriga Tiirarka Abuurka (Hubble 1995). Tiirarka samaynta xiddigaha.

somali.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Nebula-ga meereed ee ugu dhow. Wuxuu u eg yahay il hawada ku jirta.
somali.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Wuxuu ku jiraa Daruurta Magellan ee Weyn. Gobolka samaynta xiddigaha ee ugu weyn ee la yaqaan.
somali.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Hadhaaga supernova oo ~8000 sano jir ah. Qaansooyin waaweyn oo Cygnus ku yaal.
somali.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Waxaad u baahan tahay si aad u bilowdo indha-indheynta — laga bilaabo abbaaro bilaash ah ilaa telescope-yo miisaaniyad kasta ku habboon.
somali.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Barnaamij bilaash ah oo cir-tuseed ah. Wuxuu tusaa cirka habeenkii meel kasta, waqti kasta.

somali.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Qalabka bilowga ugu fiican. Wuxuu muujiyaa dayaxyada Galileo ee Jupiter, Andromeda, kooxda Pleiades.
somali.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 ama Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
somali.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE ama Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
somali.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Magaalooyinka intooda badan mid bay leeyihiin. Xubnuhu telescope-yo way amaahiyaan, wax bay baraan, xaflado xiddigeed bay qabtaan.
somali.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: U kaxee 30+ daqiiqo iftiinka magaalada. Maine way ka buuxaan. Katahdin Woods and Waters waa hoy cir-mugdi ah oo la shahaadeeyay.

somali.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Aayaha xiddiggu wuxuu ku xidhan yahay cufka: xiddig-yare bunni ah, xiddig-yare cad, xiddig nutroon, ama god madow.
somali.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Sida xiddig u dhinto ku dhawaad gebi ahaanba waxay ku xidhan tahay cufkiisii bilowga. Xadka u dhexeeya xiddigga nutroonka + godka madow lama hubo (xadka Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ hadhaaga).
somali.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Laga bilaabo 1km ilaa 93 bilyan oo sano-iftiineed. Shax tixraac oo cabbirrada koonka.
somali.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Masaafooyinku cabbir ahaan way boodaan: km ilaa AU ilaa ly ilaa bilyaman ly. Tallaabo kastaa waa ~10,000-100,000× ka weyn. Cirbixiyeenimadu waxay ku nooshahay cabbir log ah.
somali.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine waxay leedahay cir mugdi ah oo heer-caalami ah. Waxa la eego xilli kasta.
somali.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine waxay leedahay cir mugdi ah oo cajiib ah — gaar ahaan magaalooyinka woqooyigooda. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM iyo AMC Maine Woods waa goobo Caalami ah oo Cir-Mugdi ah oo la shahaadeeyay; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, iyo Cobscook sidoo kale aad bay u mugdi wanaagsan yihiin. somali.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Hawlgallada hawada ee waaweyn + dhacdooyinka 2024-2027. Waxaan ku nool nahay waqtiyo xiiso leh.
somali.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Sahaminta hawadu waxay ku jirtaa soo-noolaansho. Dalal cusub (Hindiya, Jabbaan, Imaaraadka), shirkado gaar ah oo cusub (SpaceX, Blue Origin), hawlgallo cusub (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Kor u eeg — oo fiiro gaar ah u yeel.
somali.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Kooban tixraac degdeg ah oo waxa ku jira nidaamka qorraxda + qaybinta cufka.
somali.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Qorraxdu waxay ka kooban tahay 99.86% cufka nidaamka qorraxda oo dhan. Jupiter wuxuu qaadanayaa laba-meelood-saddex-meelood ee 0.14% ee hadhay. Dhulka + wax kasta oo kalena waa inta hadhay.
somali.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Laga bilaabo Luna-deenna ilaa Triton + Enceladus. Qaarkood way ka weyn yihiin Mercury.
somali.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Dayaxyada ugu cajiibsan nidaamka qorraxda. Kuwo badan way ka weyn yihiin Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan waxay leeyihiin badaha hoosaadka ah waxayna yihiin bartilmaameedyada ugu muhiimsan ee cilmiga nolosha hawada.
somali.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Cirbixiyeennadu wax walba UTC ayay ku soo sheegaan. Sharraxaadda aagagga waqtiga.
somali.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Waqtiga Caalamiga ah ee la Isku-duway) waa tixraaca guud. Wuxuu ku salaysan yahay saacadaha atamka.
somali.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Cirbixiyeennadu dhacdooyinka waxay ku soo sheegaan UTC si goobaha indha-indheynta ee adduunka oo dhan ay u isbarbardhigi karaan. SpaceX duulimaadyadiisa UTC ayuu ku qabtaa. Hawlgallada NASA-na UTC ayay ku jiraan.
somali.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) ama UTC-4 (EDT). Landan: UTC+0 (GMT) ama UTC+1 (BST). Jabbaan: UTC+9.
somali.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Talo: marka aad akhrido jadwalka dhacdooyinka cirbixiyeenimada, had iyo jeer hubi inuu yahay UTC ama waqtiga deegaanka.
somali.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC wuxuu 1972 beddelay GMT. Wuxuu ku salaysan yahay saacadaha atamka ee shaybaarrada qaranka ee adduunka oo dhan, oo celcelis lagu sameeyay. Ilbiriqsiyo dheeraad ah ayaa la daraa marka loo baahdo.
somali.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: 40+ qalab is-dhexgal ah oo aad abkan ku sahami karto. Mid kastaa wuxuu daaqad cusub ka furaa wax koonka ku saabsan.
somali.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: 15 waayo-aragnimo koonka ah oo mudan in la raacdeeyo. Intooda badan waa bilaash + waa la gaadhi karaa.
somali.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: 15 waayo-aragnimo koonka ah oo mudan in la raacdeeyo. Intooda badan waxba kaama qaadanayaan waqti mooyaane. Cirka habeenkii waxba kaa ma weydiisto — tag oo la kulan.

somali.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Saxannada Pioneer + Duubabka Dahabka ah ee Voyager + Fariinta Arecibo — calaamadaha aadmiga ee loo diray qofkii dhegaysanaya.
somali.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminiyam dahab lagu dahaadhay oo Pioneer 10 + 11 saaran. Wuxuu muujiyaa dad qaawan, meesha Dhulku yaal, haydarojiin.
somali.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Duub fonogaraaf ah oo Voyager 1 + 2 saaran. 115 sawir, muusik (Beethoven ilaa Chuck Berry), salaan 55 luqadood ah, dhawaaqyada Dhulka.
somali.radio_broadcast_to_globular_cluster_m1: Baahin raadiye oo loo diray kooxda goobada ah ee M13. Waxay gaadhi doontaa ~25,000 sano gudahood.
somali.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + dad kale oo badan ayaa kuwan naqshadeeyay. Guddiga Duubka Voyager waxaa ka mid ahaa Ann Druyan — oo mawjadaha maskaxdeeda qayb ka mid ah duubka lagu duubay.
